ogTitle: Towong vs Towong Upper: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Towong and Towong Upper.
heading: Towong vs Towong Upper — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Towong, Victoria and Towong Upper, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Towong has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Towong Upper (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Towong or Towong Upper safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Towong has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Towong Upper scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Towong scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Towong Upper scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Towong or Towong Upper?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Towong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
